policy_watch.title: Kirloskar Ferrous Restores Solapur Plant Operations After LPG Disruption
policy_watch.summary: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited has resumed partial operations at its Solapur manufacturing facility after a brief stoppage caused by a shortage of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG). In a regulatory filing to BSE Limited dated 21 March 2026, the company stated that one of two High Pressure Moulding Lines (HPMLs) at the plant was back in operation, with an alternate fuel substituted for LPG.

policy_watch.title: Kirloskar Ferrous Flags Partial Disruption at Solapur Plant Amid LPG Supply Constraints
policy_watch.summary: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited has reported a temporary disruption in operations at its Solapur facility, citing constraints in the supply of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) linked to ongoing global energy supply chain challenges. In a regulatory filing, the company said that one of the two High Pressure Moulding Lines at its Solapur plant has been impacted, with the disruption taking effect from March 17, 202...

supplier_watch.title: Kirloskar Ferrous Restores Solapur Plant Operations After LPG Disruption
supplier_watch.summary: Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited has resumed partial operations at its Solapur manufacturing facility after a brief stoppage caused by a shortage of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG). In a regulatory filing to BSE Limited dated 21 March 2026, the company stated that one of two High Pressure Moulding Lines (HPMLs) at the plant was back in operation, with an alternate fuel substituted for LPG.

supplier_watch.title: Precision Wires India Receives BIS Certification for Copper Wire Rod Manufacturing
supplier_watch.summary: Precision Wires India Limited announced that it has received Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) certification for the manufacture of Copper Wire Rods at its plant in Valvada, Valsad, Gujarat. The certification has been granted in accordance with IS 12444, the Indian standard governing the specification and quality requirements of copper wire rods used in electrical and industrial applications.

supplier_watch.summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited's indirect wholly owned subsidiary, Motherson Global Investments B.V. (MGI B.V.), has acquired 1,408,867 common shares of Japanese auto components maker Yutaka Giken Co., Ltd.

In a regulatory filing, the company said that one of the two High Pressure Moulding Lines at its Solapur plant has been impacted, with the disruption taking effect from March 17, 202...

supplier_watch.title: Autoverse Mobility Launches Warranty Program, WhatsApp Discovery Tool and EV Training at Industry Event
supplier_watch.summary: Autoverse Mobility announced four new initiatives on 24 March 2026 at its Motor Mechanic Day event in Bangalore, covering a parts warranty program, a WhatsApp-based garage discovery feature, an underbody coating product, and a certification program for electric vehicle mechanics. The announcements signal the company's effort to address structural challenges in India's automotive aftermarket, particularly around pa...

supplier_watch.title: Michelin India Expands Retail Footprint in Pune
supplier_watch.summary: Michelin India has expanded its retail network with the launch of three new Michelin Tyres & Services (MTS) stores in Pune, in partnership with Darshan Tyres. The new outlets are located in Hadapsar, Camp and Chinchwad, extending Michelin’s presence across key areas of the city.

supplier_watch.title: Texas Instruments Launches Isolated Power Modules with Proprietary Packaging Technology
supplier_watch.summary: Texas Instruments (TI) has introduced two isolated power modules — the UCC34141-Q1 and UCC33420 — built around its proprietary IsoShield packaging technology. The company announced the products on March 24, 2026, at the Applied Power Electronics Conference (APEC) in San Antonio, Texas, one of the power electronics industry's foremost annual gatherings.

supplier_watch.title: Bridgestone Sharpens India Playbook with Five-Pillar Growth Strategy
supplier_watch.summary: Bridgestone India Pvt Ltd, the Indian arm of Japan’s Bridgestone Corporation, is sharpening its growth strategy with a five-pillar approach focused on product innovation, retail expansion, manufacturing readiness, customer experience, and talent development, as it positions India as a key market in its global portfolio. The move comes as India’s tyre market enters a new phase of growth, supported by rising vehicle...

supplier_watch.title: ZF Friedrichshafen Posts €2.1 Billion Net Loss in 2025 Despite Profit Margin Gains
supplier_watch.summary: ZF Friedrichshafen AG, one of the world's largest automotive suppliers, reported a net loss of €2.1 billion for fiscal year 2025, driven by charges related to the early termination of unprofitable electric mobility projects. Despite the accounting loss, the company exceeded its own guidance on operating profit and cash flow, and reduced its overall debt burden.

supplier_watch.title: Bosch and Tata Autocomp to form EV Drivetrain Joint Venture in India
supplier_watch.summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have formalised plans to establish a 50:50 joint venture in India to manufacture and supply e-axles and electric traction motors, strengthening their presence in the country’s growing e-mobility market. The companies signed the joint venture agreement on March 23, following board approval by Bosch Limited on March 18, 2026.

supplier_watch.title: Henkel Opens Electronics Application Center in Bengaluru
supplier_watch.summary: Henkel has launched a Customer Application Center in Bengaluru, positioning the facility as a hub for co-developing, testing, and validating adhesive, thermal management, and coating solutions for electronics manufacturers in India. The opening marks what the company describes as one of its most significant application engineering investments in the India, Middle East, and Africa (IMEA) region.

high_signal_newsflow.summary: The Maruti Suzuki Board approved the new infusion of capital that includes investment for the first phase of car manufacturing plant having an annual manufacturing capacity of 250,000 units and some common infrastructure and facilities for future plants

high_signal_newsflow.title: Euler Motors raises ₹437.5 cr to scale EV manufacturing, R&D growth
high_signal_newsflow.summary: The New Delhi-based e-CV startup, which aims to be among the top players in the segment, is on track to deliver a 100 per cent growth over FY25 revenue of ₹191 crore

high_signal_newsflow.summary: Beyond the capacity expansion at Rajasthan and other plants, Honda has already made known that it will be setting up an exclusive facility to develop electric two-wheelers in 2028.

articles.summary: ZF Friedrichshafen AG, one of the world's largest automotive suppliers, reported a net loss of €2.1 billion for fiscal year 2025, driven by charges related to the early termination of unprofitable electric mobility projects. Despite the accounting loss, the company exceeded its own guidance on operating profit and cash flow, and reduced its overall debt burden.

The companies signed the joint venture agreement on March 23, following board approval by Bosch Limited on March 18, 2026.

articles.title: BKT Tyres Signs On as Official Tyre Partner for Eight IPL Teams Ahead of 2026 Season
articles.summary: Balkrishna Industries Ltd. (BKT) announced that its consumer brand, BKT Tyres, will serve as the Official Tyre Partner for eight of the ten teams in the Indian Premier League's 2026 season.

articles.title: Microchip Technology Launches Automotive-Grade System-in-Package Chip for Vehicle Display Applications
articles.summary: Microchip Technology has announced the SAM9X75D5M, an AEC-Q100 Grade 2-qualified System-in-Package (SiP) designed for automotive and e-mobility applications. The device combines an Arm926EJ-S processor with 512 Mbit of DDR2 SDRAM in a single package and is priced at $9.12 each in quantities of 5,000 units.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki’s Manesar rail siding dispatches one lakh vehicles in nine months
articles.summary: Rail-based dispatches scale up as company targets 35 per cent share by FY31

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki India announces management reshuffle; Dr Tapan Sahoo to take additional charge of IT
articles.summary: The reshuffle will see senior executives taking on expanded responsibilities across technology, service and parts verticals as part of organisational realignment ahead of the new financial year

articles.title: SEW Eurodrive Inaugurates New Drive Technology Centre in Chennai
articles.summary: SEW-Eurodrive India has inaugurated a new Drive Technology Centre in Chennai, aimed at strengthening its operational capabilities and enhancing customer responsiveness across South and East India. Built with a long-term perspective, the facility is spread across 12.27 acres and is designed to offer scalability and flexibility to support future growth and expansion.

articles.title: Varroc Engineering Opens Registrations for Eureka Challenge 3.0
articles.summary: Varroc Engineering Ltd. has launched the third edition of its student innovation programme, Eureka Challenge 3.0, with registrations now open on the Unstop platform.

articles.title: ZF Steering Gear (India) Completes Transfer of Factory Lease to Subsidiary Following MIDC Approval
articles.summary: ZF Steering Gear (India) Limited has notified BSE Limited that its wholly owned subsidiary, DriveSys Systems Private Limited, formally executed a lease deed on March 18, 2026 with the Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation (MIDC) for factory premises in Ahilyanagar, Maharashtra. The transaction marks the completion of an internal reorganisation of leasehold rights that had been in progress for several mont...

articles.title: Cosmo Consumer Enters Automotive Ceramic Coating Segment
articles.summary: Cosmo Consumer, the consumer-facing division of Cosmo First Limited, has entered the automotive ceramic coating segment with the launch of Cosmo Guard, a nano-ceramic coating solution aimed at vehicle surface protection. The move expands the company’s automotive protection portfolio, which already includes paint protection films (PPF) and window films.

articles.title: Zenergize Partners with Infineon to Advance Power Electronics for Clean Energy
articles.summary: Zenergize, an India-based power-electronics product company, has entered into a technology partnership with Infineon Technologies to integrate advanced semiconductor components into its product portfolio for solar and distributed energy applications. Under the agreement, Zenergize will incorporate Infineon’s silicon carbide (SiC) power devices into its systems, along with technical and application-level support.

articles.title: Belrise Industries to Acquire UK-Based Chester Hall Precision Engineering
articles.summary: Belrise Industries Limited on Tuesday said its step-down wholly owned subsidiary, Belrise UK Holdings Limited, has signed a definitive agreement to acquire 100% stake in Chester Hall Precision Engineering Holdings Limited, a United Kingdom-based engineering firm serving aerospace, space and defence sectors. The acquisition marks Belrise’s entry into the global aerospace and defence precision engineering supply chain.

articles.title: Autoverse Mobility bets on direct-to-garage model to disrupt $11 billion auto aftermarket
articles.summary: Data-led supply chain targets 140,000 garages, cuts inefficiencies in parts sourcing.

articles.title: Renault Duster ARAI Mileage Revealed – 160 bhp, 18.45 km/l DCT, 17.75 km/l MT
articles.summary: Renault Duster ARAI mileage figures have been announced and the numbers go till 18.45 km/l with DCT and 17.75 km/l with MT The post Renault Duster ARAI Mileage Revealed – 160 bhp, 18.45 km/l DCT, 17.75 km/l MT appeared first on RushLane .

articles.title: Bridgestone lines up five-pronged strategy to deepen India play
articles.summary: For the Japanese tyremaker, India counts among its top five growth markets. The company’s top honcho says the tyremaker is on track to meet its top-line and bottom-line targets this fiscal, with a five-pronged strategy guiding its future expansion

articles.title: AUMOVIO Posts Higher Profit in 2025 Despite Revenue Decline
articles.summary: AUMOVIO reported adjusted earnings before interest and taxes (EBIT) of €717 million for fiscal year 2025, a 45.4% increase from €493 million the prior year, despite a 5% drop in adjusted consolidated sales to €18.5 billion. The adjusted EBIT margin reached 3.9%, up from 2.5% in 2024, landing at the top of the company's own guidance range.
